register.note: hero.png is a title + placard card + act rail with no specimen visual at all, where ciechanowski-watch/00 opens on a thumbnail-legible rendered watch face.
no hero exists to depict residuals or the fitted line the way seeing-theory-regression/01 draws the OLS line with squared-error squares through the data.

the SEE scatter self-labels axes + a mono title but has no in-graphic mechanism callout, so meaning still lives in adjacent prose unlike distill-momentum/02's labelled regimes, inline math, and captions inside the figure.

calm warm-paper chrome but see-viewport spends the whole fold on a repeated masthead/placard with the graphic ~400px below (ciechanowski-watch/02 fills the frame with the specimen), and the lede renders 'been'the model with a missing space.

run supports drag-to-predict-and-reveal but statics show no step/transport affordance and I cannot confirm motion is explanatory, where 3b1b-gradient-descent/02 stages a deliberate cost-stacking reveal.

break-full holds the lab grammar exactly — blue prediction line + shaded band, amber-filled vs red-hollow points (shape as redundant channel), crimson 'accuracy' prose terms bound to the figure, teal distance — with no all-red dilution, matching r2d3-trees/00's strict semantic colour split.

hero.note: needs a wide ambient specimen portrait above the masthead — amber data with a prediction-hued line easing into the fit and residuals shown — so the page opens on the mechanism, not a placard.

assessment.note: the closing transfer-wrong-metric item is a 3-option choice MCQ with per-option feedback, not an interaction or open prompt, though the set is not a pure MCQ stack (it includes a predict and a live experiment-task).

blocking: No specimen hero: hero.png shows only title + placard, forcing hero-as-protagonist and mechanism-in-the-picture to 0 against floor 3.
SEE scatter carries no in-graphic mechanism annotation, leaving annotation-integration at 2 vs distill-momentum's labelled figure.
The fold is dead air above the graphic and the lede has a missing-space rendering bug ('been'the model), holding atmosphere-finish at 2.
The closing transfer item is another MCQ, not an interactive/open prompt, under-serving the learning-loop payoff.
verdict.summary: A colour-coherent, calm blog-with-figures that does not yet clear register 3 — it lacks the composed specimen hero and in-graphic mechanism that the benchmark set demands.
